title: Vortex Turbo
description: An all around performance boosting modpack
body:
![vortex turbo logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e4f5d32c74b15eaa6c8e3141c7f826f51d78a64.png)

The modpack "Vortex Turbo" boosts performance drastically and optimizes the game for a smooth gameplay as proven in the "Gallery" tab

Specs tested with:

Cpu:AMD Ryzen 3 4300U with Radeon Graphics
Ram/Memory:8gb of ddr4 ram 3200MT/s
Gpu:Amd Radeon(TM) Graphics
Device type:laptop(ASUS Vivobook Flip 14)
Model Number:TM420IA-EC055T

settings tested with:

Graphics:Fancy
Chunk Render distance:32
Shadow/Simulation distance:32/32
